title: EC Flip Word Notes
html_prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB visual word-note flashcard. No external assets, no CDN, and no frameworks. Build the full scene with HTML, CSS, inline SVG, gradients, blur, shadows, text, and CSS 3D transforms. Preserve a minimal off-white paper texture, top header with EC LAB / ec 的实验室, footer with Build with AI and Record. Explore. Share., and a centered vertical card stack. The main interaction is a top-bound physical page-flip animation using perspective, rotateX, transform-origin: top center, layered pages, paper shadows, and tap/click zones for forward/backward navigation. Include hand-drawn SVG JRPG-style vocabulary illustrations and a two-step reveal where the illustration first appears, then shrinks to reveal vocabulary columns. Use EC LAB, Visual Notes, AI Workflow, Design, Prompt, Code, Inspiration language only. Use the EC font sets and EC radius tokens.

css.--blur: blur filters and subtle backdrop/paper noise texture
css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
